name: Gene de Paul
abstract: Gene Vincent de Paul (June 17, 1919 – February 27, 1988) was an American pianist, composer and songwriter.

works_created.t: You Don't Know What Love Is

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Rowles
about_quotes.evidence: The guy that wrote the lyrics to 'I'll Remember April,' Gene DePaul, he was there -- he and Mitchum and me.
